flake
flakeflake NaN  (start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[... dUTU.KU₄].⸢KU₄ IGI-šu₂ GARnu⸣ [...]

(flake 1') [...] puts its face [towards] sunset [...] will be brought about. Reign of annihilation [...].

flake 2'2'

[...] GAR BAL NAM.⸢GILIM⸣.[MA ...]

flake 3'3'

[...] ša₂ ka-mu-us-su x [...]

(flake 3') [...] who [...] his bondage [...] they weep and they fall. [...]

flake 4'4'

[... i-ba-ak]-ku-u u i-me₂-qu-[tu ...]

flake 5'5'

[...] DU NA BI ⸢SIG₅⸣ [...]

(flake 5') [...] blows: that man will prosper. [...]

(flake 6') [...] blows: [...] bread. [...]
